step_by_step_reasoning: We identify two User icons: Content Originators and Media Outlets, both mapped to UserConsumerWebMobile. Traffic hits ELB, filtered by a WAF Firewall. The web application tier runs on EC2 (APP). S3 stores master files and delivery copies. SQS handles asynchronous work priority queues. QC, transcoding, and batch jobs run on dedicated EC2 clusters. Deliveries are either direct from S3 or via CloudFront.

graph.name: Extreme Reach Adbridge Video Distribution Architecture
graph.notes: System processes and transcodes major US advertising traffic, using SQS queues for asynchronous task prioritization and S3 for direct-to-destination delivery.

nodes.name: Content Originators
nodes.notes: Advertisers and brand publishers uploading original video assets.

nodes.name: Media Outlets
nodes.notes: Broadcasters and destination endpoints retrieving finished ads.

nodes.name: Elastic Load Balancer
nodes.notes: Balances entry traffic from UI and API uploads.

nodes.name: WAF
nodes.notes: Web Application Firewall monitoring ELB traffic.

nodes.name: Application Servers
nodes.notes: Front-end web tier for API/UI interactions.

nodes.name: QC / Transcoding
nodes.notes: Custom EC2 fleet for quality control and transcoding.

nodes.name: Batch Servers
nodes.notes: Custom EC2 batch applications orchestrating work.

nodes.name: Simple Queue Service
nodes.notes: Asynchronous high/low priority queues for workloads.

nodes.name: S3 Cloud Storage
nodes.notes: Direct source of truth and distribution storage.

nodes.name: CloudFront CDN
nodes.notes: Delivers digital video ads to consumers/destinations.

edges.notes: Originators send metadata / api requests through ELB.
Traffic filtered and verified by WAF.
Traffic routed to Application EC2 instances.
Direct file upload from Java Media Uploader to S3.
App tier queues transcoding work in SQS.
Transcoding fleet polls SQS for tasks.
Batch servers poll SQS for work items.
Processed/QC transcoded files saved back to S3.
Media Outlets query system for available deliveries.
Direct download of TV files from S3.
CloudFront origins assets from S3 bucket.
